_comment: FFFF field map for Form 1040 (2025). Generated by running crow_browser_discover_selectors on FFFF. Keys are crow-tax line IDs, values contain the aria-label used by FFFF.
_instructions: To regenerate: navigate to Form 1040 in FFFF, run discover_selectors in the form iframe, then match aria-labels to IRS line numbers.
_status: PLACEHOLDER — must be populated by running discovery on live FFFF site
